ModMetaData.name: BioSynthetic: Vanilla Impid Reimagined
ModMetaData.author: BattIeBear
ModMetaData.description:
V1.6
A mod that reimagines impids as extremely mobile raiders, with a focus on hit-and-run tactics and their innate fire resistance. This mod adds a new fierce impid faction, staying true to their image as raiders while allowing for alliances down the road. Impid attacks will often come equipped with basic firearms stolen from other factions, while making them not quite as numerous as other tribals.
Also comes with many cosmetic options, and is balanced around them making use of the Naked Speed gene (though does provide an alternative!)
As always, as much as possible is toggleable, meaning you can have everything mentioned above or turn it all off one-by-one!
